lesson: The attempt harmonized the subject note-for-note in tenths - pleasant, and not counterpoint: one attack clock, one stream (rhythmic_homorhythm 1.00). The correction moves the counter-line into a different rhythmic stratum, double-speed figurae cells riding the subject's grid the way Contrapunctus IX runs eighths against the theme in augmentation. Rate separation is a stream-segregation cue as strong as direction: voices in different rhythm bands cannot fuse, so the counter-line finally becomes a second melody instead of a harmony part.
